steps: Launch the app via `.\scripts\launch-toaster-monitored.ps1 -ObservationSeconds 300`.
Open Settings > Models.
Set the filter to Post-processing.
Click Download on a post-processor model that is not yet downloaded.
Confirm the progress bar advances from 0% to 100% without stalling.
Confirm no errors appear in the monitored console output.
Launch the app via `.\scripts\launch-toaster-monitored.ps1 -ObservationSeconds 300`.
Open Settings > Models.
Ensure the category filter is set to All.
Scroll the list and confirm at least one card shows a 'Transcription' badge and at least one card shows a 'Post-processing' badge.
With the app running and Settings > Models open, click the Post-processing segment of the filter.
Confirm every visible card now shows the 'Post-processing' badge.
Confirm no card with the 'Transcription' badge is visible.
Click All and confirm both categories are visible again.
With Settings > Models open, visually scan every filter label and every card badge.
Confirm no on-screen text contains the raw token 'PostProcessor'.
Confirm every user-visible label reads 'Post-processing' (hyphenated) or 'Transcription'.
Open Settings > Post Processing.
Select a different post-processor model than the current default.
Close the Settings window.
Quit and relaunch the app via `.\scripts\launch-toaster-monitored.ps1 -ObservationSeconds 300`.
Re-open Settings > Post Processing and confirm the previously selected model is still selected.
Launch the app via `.\scripts\launch-toaster-monitored.ps1 -ObservationSeconds 600`.
Open Settings > Models and switch the filter between All, Transcription, and Post-processing; confirm cards filter correctly.
Click Download on one transcription model and one post-processor model; confirm both progress bars advance and downloads complete with no console errors.
Cancel an in-progress download; confirm the partial file handling matches existing Transcription behavior.
Open Settings > Post Processing and confirm the locked-filter embed lists only Post-processing models.
Click the 'Manage models' deep-link; confirm it lands on Settings > Models with the Post-processing filter pre-applied.
Quit and relaunch the app; confirm persisted selections survive.
Confirm no runtime panics, 404s, or deprecation-warning spam beyond the single-per-call budget in the monitored log.
